name: Memory WorthyDB
description: Local-first LLM-extracted long-term memory for OpenClaw

extraction.apiKey.label: Gemini API Key
extraction.apiKey.help: Gemini API key used for durable fact extraction.

extraction.maxFacts.label: Max Extracted Facts
extraction.maxFacts.help: Maximum number of atomic memories extracted from a turn.

embedding.ollamaUrl.label: Ollama URL
embedding.ollamaUrl.help: Base URL for the local Ollama server.

embedding.model.label: Embedding Model
embedding.model.help: Ollama embedding model used for storage and recall.

embedding.dimensions.label: Embedding Dimensions
embedding.dimensions.help: Expected embedding dimension for the selected Ollama model.

dbPath.label: Database Path
dbPath.help: LanceDB path template. Use {agentId} for agent-scoped isolation.

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically extract durable memory facts after each successful turn.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories before each turn.

maxRecallResults.label: Max Recall Results
maxRecallResults.help: Maximum memories injected or returned by recall.

dedup.threshold.label: Dedup Threshold
dedup.threshold.help: Cosine similarity threshold used to reject duplicate memories.

ttl.preference.label: Preference TTL (days)
ttl.preference.help: Days before unrecalled preferences can expire. Use 0 to keep forever.

ttl.decision.label: Decision TTL (days)
ttl.decision.help: Days before unrecalled decisions can expire.

ttl.entity.label: Entity TTL (days)
ttl.entity.help: Days before entity memories can expire. 0 disables expiry.

ttl.fact.label: Fact TTL (days)
ttl.fact.help: Days before unrecalled facts can expire.

ttl.other.label: Other TTL (days)
ttl.other.help: Days before unrecalled miscellaneous memories can expire.

capture.skipCron.label: Skip Cron Sessions
capture.skipCron.help: Do not capture from cron, isolated, or non-chat sessions.

capture.skipNoReply.label: Skip Sentinels
capture.skipNoReply.help: Ignore NO_REPLY and HEARTBEAT_OK assistant outputs.

capture.minTurnChars.label: Min Turn Chars
capture.minTurnChars.help: Minimum combined user/assistant text length eligible for extraction.

capture.maxTurnChars.label: Max Turn Chars
capture.maxTurnChars.help: Maximum combined user/assistant text length sent to extraction.
